name: gitwork
description: Git platform development workflow assistant for issue, PR/MR, pipeline, review and worktree delivery, supporting both GitHub and GitLab.

interface.shortDescription: Ship GitHub/GitLab work through branches, worktrees, and PRs/MRs
interface.longDescription: Guide GitHub and GitLab issue, PR/MR, review, and pipeline tasks all the way through the actual git platform delivery workflow.
defaultPrompt: 基于当前仓库处理一个 GitHub/GitLab 任务，并最终交付到 PR/MR。
